title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
